content_fingerprint: mistral releases medium 3 5 as open weights targeting agentic and coding workloads mistral has published mistral medium 3 5 a frontier class multimodal model tuned for agentic and coding tasks offered as open weights under a modified mit license mistral released mistral medium 3 5 on april 26 the latest entry in its flagship medium tier line of language models the model is described as frontier class and multimodal optimized specifically for agentic and coding use cases a notable addition is a reasoning effort parameter that allows developers to adjust the depth of the model s reasoning on the
